sections.item_1a_risk_factors: We face intense competition, regulatory litigation, and supply chain disruption. Our business may be adversely affected by macroeconomic uncertainty and cybersecurity threats. Revenue declined 12% in fiscal 2024. We depend on key suppliers and may experience margin pressure.
sections.item_7_mdna: Revenue decreased 12% year over year due to softer demand. We may be unable to predict future results. Liquidity remains adequate though covenant compliance could become challenging if conditions worsen.
sections.item_9a_controls: Management concluded internal control over financial reporting was effective. No material weaknesses were identified during the year.
sections.item_3_legal_proceedings: We are subject to routine litigation. No material legal proceedings are pending.
sections.item_1c_cybersecurity: Our cybersecurity program includes board oversight, annual training, and incident response planning.

prior_sections.item_1a_risk_factors: We face competition and regulatory requirements. Our business may be affected by economic conditions. Revenue was stable in fiscal 2023.
prior_sections.item_7_mdna: Revenue was stable year over year. We expect continued investment in operations.

sections.item_1_05: On March 1, 2024 we determined that a ransomware attack constituted a material cybersecurity incident. Unauthorized access led to data exfiltration and a systems outage affecting operations.
sections.item_8_01: The company announced a regulatory investigation related to prior disclosures.
